caption:
“To see the world in a grain of sand.” — Blake

Reflection:
Infinity hides within the smallest dust. Wonder opens the eye to eternity’s detail.

Commentary:
Blake’s insight reminds us that divinity fills all creation. Nothing is too small to carry glory; perception is the path to awe.
